title: Ubiquiti USW-Pro-Max-48
description: Ubiquiti Pro Max 48 is a quality switch. It has 16 LAN ports with speeds up to 2.5 Gbps . The other 32 ports have a speed of 1 Gbps. There are also 4 SFP+ ports with speeds up to 10 Gbps . The switch can be configured using UniFi Controller . It also features a touchscreen display with controls. On the back, in addition to the normal power supply, we also find a backup DC power supply, which is used for example in the event of a power failure Backup DC power supply Configurable via UniFi Controller High connection speed - 16 LAN ports at 2.5 Gbps and 32 LAN ports at 1 Gbps 4 SFP+ ports up to 10 Gbps Device Power cable Rack mounting kit
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (16) 100/1000/2500 Mbps + (32) 10/100/1000 Mbps Optical interfaces (4) 1G/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen Power Power type Mains power (230V) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 100 Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 443 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 325 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 224
